scripts.lint:rust: cargo fmt --check && cargo clippy -p t3-tape --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: pnpm run test:rust && pnpm run test:node && pnpm run test:examples
scripts.test:examples: pnpm -C examples/basic-fork test && pnpm -C examples/agent-kit test && pnpm -C examples/migration-autopilot test && pnpm -C examples/dev-env-doctor test && pnpm -C examples/test-impact-planner test && pnpm -C examples/release-note-router test && pnpm -C examples/agent-handoff-builder test && pnpm -C examples/migration-review-assistant test && pnpm -C examples/fleet-upgrade-coordinator test
